_comment: Local copy of the Palis MCP server's tool definitions. Per the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit CLI, an mcp-tools file is REQUIRED when the MCP server needs authentication (Palis uses OAuth 2.0 / Entra ID). The toolkit can also fetch/regenerate this from the server's tools/list. Structure mirrors the reference build (JSON Schema draft-07 inputSchema, additionalProperties:false).

tools.name: inventory_agents
tools.description: List the Microsoft 365 Copilot agents in the tenant and the data each one touches. Use first; you cannot govern what you cannot see.

tools.name: evaluate_agent
tools.description: Score one agent's regulated-data governance posture and return the gaps (deterministic rules -> per-dimension scores -> RED/AMBER/GREEN band).

includeRegulatoryContext.description: If true, include the regulatory framework context alongside each gap.

tools.name: map_to_controls
tools.description: Translate an agent's gaps into specific, cited regulatory controls (21 CFR Part 11, HIPAA, ICH-GCP, GDPR), each grounded via Foundry IQ. A gap is never returned without a grounded citation.

tools.name: generate_attestation
tools.description: Return a presentation-ready, control-by-control compliance evidence bundle for an agent, in the format an IRB or FDA reviewer expects. Renders as an MCP App card.

includeRemediation.description: If true, include suggested remediation language for each gap.

tools.name: reconcile_authorization
tools.description: Reconcile study activity against the Delegation of Authority Log timeline. Catches tasks performed before delegation was effective or PI-signed, expired GCP certifications, and undelegated performers - the temporal failures a valid-looking DOAL hides. Each finding includes a cited control and an auto-drafted deviation note.

tools.name: check_authorization
tools.description: Proactive pre-task gate. Before a staff member performs a task, check whether they are on the current DOAL, PI-signed, in delegated scope, and credentialed as of the proposed date. Returns authorized true/false with specific reasons, to prevent a deviation rather than document it after the fact.

proposedDate.description: Proposed date of the task, ISO format YYYY-MM-DD.
